title: Exactly What I Want — Emily Wishlist
html:
TL;DR

  • Yahir writing a desire-and-rituals wishlist for life with Emily — domestic, intimate, and explicitly sensual.
  • Domestic textures: sushi date, Miller High Life case in the fridge, one nicely-scented candle, fruits to snack on, beautiful home-cooked Emily dinner with shared wine.
  • Movement and place: walking around a lot day and night, one nature spot, one music spot, Austin boardwalk at sunset with cider, cortado date "thinking about nothing except the moment we are sharing."
  • Activities: chess once, a movie theater date, push-ups he counts, kiss breaks, a massage so hard he cries.
  • Closes by referencing "The Best Sushi in Austin" guide — pinning the wishlist to a real geography.

Notes

A pure-want note from late October 2025, written about three months into the Austin chapter. The list is half quotidian (Miller High Life in the fridge, fruits, one candle) and half explicitly sexual. It belongs in the Emily arc as an artifact of what Yahir is imagining domestic intimacy looking like — not a fantasy of someone else, but a pinned set of textures with a named partner.

The structural detail worth noting: nearly every wish has a small texture attached — not "go to a nice restaurant" but "shared bottle of wine." Not "have sex" but "fuck in the kitchen and the closet and the shower." The granularity is the point — Yahir is making the imagined life concrete enough to be specific. Connects to the same impulse in the falls backwards into the void manifesto four months later: name the thing, in pictures, until it's real.

Connections

  • emily — the addressee throughout.
  • austin tx — boardwalk, sushi, the city as backdrop.
  • miller high life — recurring beverage signal in the emily arc.
  • — same imagining-it-into-being technique.
